name_cn:
🎉3-in-1 Tote Bag🎉1BG380🎉🎉
This System tote features two leather handles, exquisite stitching creating a triangular pattern, showcasing craftsmanship. The detachable woven nylon shoulder strap offers different styles; the mini bag on the strap is the favorite 😘 Lightweight and practical, get yours now🎉🎉
